kyc.heroLead: Complete verification to unlock withdrawals, P2P, fiat channels, and improve account security. This is a demo flow: data stays in this browser only and is not uploaded; production should use a licensed KYC provider.

photoDo.1: Keep all four corners in frame
photoDo.2: Text must be readable; no fingers covering key fields
photoDo.3: For handheld selfies, show face + document + dated note (common in production)

photoDont.1: No coins or objects covering the document
photoDont.2: No documents that are not yours

kyc.limitsSub: Demo limits below; live limits follow risk policy.
kyc.basicSub: Must match your ID. Fraud may lead to restrictions. In this demo, pick approve/reject manually.
kyc.advSub: For higher fiat and withdrawal limits. Demo does not upload real images.
kyc.bannerBasicReview: In review — choose a demo outcome below (approve / reject). Submitted {time}
kyc.bannerAdvReview: Advanced review — choose a demo outcome below. Submitted {time}
kyc.consentBasic: I confirm the information and images are true and authorize processing for compliance (demo).
kyc.consentAdv: I confirm the address proof and selfie are valid for higher-limit risk review (demo).
kyc.badgeHint1: Complete Lv.2 for higher fiat and withdrawal limits
kyc.badgeHint0: Unverified: withdrawals / P2P / fiat may be limited (demo)

why.a: AML/KYC compliance and to unlock withdrawals, P2P, and fiat. Production uses licensed vendors.

time.a: Live: minutes to several business days. Demo: you choose approve/reject after submit.

reject.a: Ensure corners, no glare, data matches the form; no screenshots. If rejected, fix and resubmit.

privacy.a: Demo uses localStorage only. Production needs encryption, minimization, and audited access.

idFront.title: ID front (portrait side)
idFront.hint: JPG / PNG / WebP, ≤5MB, full corners, no glare

idBack.title: ID back (national emblem side)
idBack.hint: Same document as front; text readable

passportBio.title: Passport bio page (photo page)
passportBio.hint: Personal data page; full corners; JPG / PNG / WebP, ≤5MB (demo)

selfie.title: Selfie holding ID
selfie.hint: Face + readable ID; dated handwritten note recommended

rejectReason.blur: Photos are blurry or too reflective. Please retake and upload.
rejectReason.mismatch: ID data does not match the form. Please correct and resubmit.
rejectReason.address: Address proof cannot be verified. Upload a valid bill within ~3 months.
rejectReason.selfie: Selfie does not meet rules. Ensure face and ID are in frame and readable.

error.uploadAllIdDocs: Please upload all required ID images
error.name: Enter your legal name as on ID (≥2 characters)
error.idCnInvalid: Invalid Chinese national ID format or checksum
error.adult: You must be at least 18 years old
error.consentBasic: Please read and accept the declaration
error.consentAdv: Please read and accept the advanced declaration

toast.submittedBasic: Basic verification submitted — choose a demo outcome
toast.submittedAdvanced: Advanced verification submitted — choose a demo outcome
toast.demoBasicReject: Basic rejected (demo) — fix issues and resubmit
toast.demoAdvReject: Advanced rejected (demo) — fix issues and resubmit
